overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi survival horror game. A character in a spacesuit explores dark, industrial maintenance corridors of a spaceship or space station, navigating through steam-filled tunnels, interacting with secure doors, and entering a crew lounge to collect an item. The atmosphere is tense with low lighting, emergency red lights, and detailed industrial aesthetics.

events.description: camera cuts to close-up of character's face illuminated by intense red emergency lighting

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the dark maintenance corridor, flashlight illuminating boxes and piping

entered.detail: network of industrial pipes and conduits running along the ceiling
stacked boxes with blue tape on metal shelving units
industrial metal racks holding supplies and equipment
pulsing red warning light visible in the distance
large industrial security door with reinforced frame
illuminated access panel with screen and buttons

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dark maintenance corridor with exposed piping overhead and storage boxes lining the right side. Around the 10-second mark, a cinematic cut shows the character's face bathed in red emergency light. The segment ends as the character approaches the break room door with its control panel visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with poster and piping

events.description: character opens the break room door and passes through into the corridor beyond
character passes a wall poster triggering a content unlocked notification

agents.ego_description: opening the secure door and continuing through the industrial maintenance tunnels

entered.detail: illuminated wall poster displaying promotional artwork
large red painted pipes running vertically along the wall
heavy industrial door labeled DRILL BAY with warning signs

segments.scene_description: The character opens the break room door and proceeds into a new section of corridor featuring red industrial pipes and a promotional poster on the wall. The lighting shifts slightly as the character moves deeper into the maintenance tunnels, approaching the drill bay door visible in the distance.

events.description: steam vents release white vapor into the corridor, reducing visibility
character enters the drill bay door transitioning to a new area with yellow lighting

agents.ego_description: navigating through steam-filled corridors toward the drill bay entrance

entered.detail: pipes releasing white steam and vapor into the corridor
sign indicating DRILL BAY with directional arrow
doorway leading to the crew lounge area with different lighting
warm yellow emergency lights in the transitional space

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the drill bay door while navigating through corridors filled with venting steam. The environment features prominent red pipes and warning signage. After passing through the drill bay door around 42 seconds, the lighting shifts to a warmer yellow tone as the character enters a transitional space leading to the lounge.

scene_state.functional_zone: crew break room with dining tables

events.description: entering the well-lit lounge from dark corridors, lighting becomes warm and ambient
character approaches the table and picks up a data pad or electronic device

agents.ego_description: entering the break room, exploring the lounge area, and collecting an item from the table

entered.detail: tables and chairs arranged for dining and meetings
long rectangular LED light panels providing warm illumination
built-in seating along the right wall
electronic data pad or device on the table
exit leading back to the industrial corridors

segments.scene_description: The character enters a well-lit crew lounge with carpeted flooring, tables, chairs, and modern LED lighting. The atmosphere shifts from industrial to habitable. The character explores the room, approaches a table with various items including a coffee mug and papers, and picks up a data pad or electronic device to collect it.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through oppressive industrial maintenance tunnels that gradually opens into a brightly lit, habitable crew lounge. It begins in a narrow, dark corridor with exposed piping and storage boxes, where the character's face is momentarily bathed in the harsh glow of red emergency lights before they reach a secure door. As the character opens the door, the scene shifts into a new section of corridors marked by red industrial pipes and promotional posters, eventually leading through clouds of venting steam and past warning signage. The environment then transitions through the drill bay door, where the lighting shifts from red to a warmer yellow tone. Finally, the camera enters a well-lit lounge with carpeted floors and modern LED lighting, moving past tables and chairs toward a coffee mug and papers to collect a data pad.
